rule_name: Network - Potential DNS Tunneling for Data Exfiltration
search_query: index=network sourcetype=dns | eval query_length=len(query) | where query_length > 100 | stats count by src_ip, query | where count > 10 | rename query_length as "DNS_Payload_Size"
description: Detects unusually long DNS queries (over 100 characters) originating from the same source. Attackers use DNS tunneling to bypass network security controls and exfiltrate sensitive data or establish C2 channels.
